Satoru Rendering Engine

@media print Support Verification

This section is visible only during printing.

Media Query Test

This document is for testing dynamic style switching based on media type settings.

Status: Styles for "Screen" are currently applied. You should see a blue background and side border. Styles for "Print" are currently applied. The background is white and the navigation menu is hidden.

By specifying mediaType: 'print' in Satoru's RenderOptions, the color of the "Alert" box below will change, the navigation bar will disappear, and a print-only message (the grey text right above) will be displayed.

This box has a red background on screen, but will be monochrome (or grey background) during printing.
